channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: France vs Australia free streams: How to watch Autumn International 2025, TV Channels, Preview & Team News
item.description: All the ways to watch France vs Australia live streams online, as Les Bleus host the Wallabies at Stade de France for their 2025 Autumn International closer.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Liverpool vs Nottingham Forest live streams: How to watch Premier League 25/26 clash online
item.description: We'll show you all the ways you can watch Liverpool vs Nottingham Forest in the Premier League this Saturday, including cheap options.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Shapland, TechRadar

item.title: New anti-Mamdani AI videos and the deepfake generation of astroturfing
item.description: A creepy account that’s almost certainly using AI to generate videos of imaginary New Yorkers criticizing mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani raises a frightening prospect: that deepfakes could be used not just to impersonate politicians, but also constituents.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: Black Friday scams are everywhere now – here are the 5 best ways to stay safe
item.description: Here are 5 ways to keep fraudsters at bay this Black Friday and ensure your money stays out of scammers’ reach.
item.dc:creator: Alex Blake, TechRadar

item.title: Comet AI browser lands on Android
item.description: Perplexity's Comet browser brings smart, voice-enabled AI help to mobile browsing, aiming to turn every tab into a conversation.
item.dc:creator: Eric Hal Schwartz, TechRadar

item.title: Meta enters power trading to support its AI energy needs
item.description: Meta Platforms Inc. is venturing into the complex world of electricity trading, betting it can accelerate the construction of new US power plants that are vital to its artificial intelligence ambitions.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: How to watch Globoplay from anywhere – stream online and outside of Brazil
item.description: Here's how to watch Globoplay from outside Brazil, and learn how to access streams from anywhere abroad with a VPN.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: Nestlé manages business processes with SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
item.description: With approximately 280,000 employees and sales of 91.4 billion Swiss francs (2024), Nestlé is one of the world’s largest food and beverage manufacturers. Well-known brands of the group include Maggi, the KitKat chocolate bar, and coffee specialties such as Nespresso and Nescafé.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: It’s the end of vibe coding, already
item.description: In the early days of generative AI, AI-driven programming seemed to promise endless possibility, or at least a free pass to vibe code your way into quick wins. But now that era of freewheeling experimentation is coming to an end.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Nvidia chips sold out? Cut back on AI plans, or look elsewhere
item.description: Nvidia CFO Colette Kress’s claim that “The clouds are sold out, and our GPU-installed base […] is fully utilized,” may have thrilled shareholders listening to the company’s earnings call on Wednesday, but it’s bad news for CIOs and data center managers who were counting on Nvidia for increased AI co
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Bubble fears ease but investors still waiting for AI to live up to its promise
item.description: Fears about the artificial intelligence boom turning into an overblown bubble have diminished for now, thanks to a stellar earnings report from Nvidia.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Roblox bid for ad riches collides with wary sponsors, developers
item.description: Roblox Corp. executives have been trying to get advertisers to market their wares in the gaming platform’s virtual worlds since the company went public in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Spanish court orders Meta to pay nearly half a billion euros in damages to media outlets
item.description: Spanish legacy media companies in Spain have scored a victory against social media giant Meta after a Madrid-based court ordered that it must pay news outlets nearly half a billion euros in damages.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Wilson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OPM’s HR modernization strategy sets next sight on USA Hire
item.description: The Office of Personnel Management is meeting with vendors after issuing a RFI to improve the USA Hire platform as it expects a surge in its use. The post OPM’s HR modernization strategy sets next sight on USA Hire first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: From small business roots to mid-tier powerhouse, this firm is using employee ownership and AI to stay ahead in federal contracting
item.description: "I've got to show up every day changing hearts and minds, showing the innovation and showing how at the end of the day, it's actually better," Travis Mack said.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves
item.description: "There's so much focus on threat actors. There's a cost to that, and the cost is that we forget about our own people," Josh Ferenczi said. The post When a cyberattack hits, breakdowns inside the organization may be as dangerous as the hackers themselves first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: AWS boosts its long-distance cloud connections with custom DWDM transponder
item.description: Amazon Web Services has developed a new Dense Wavelength Division Multiplexing (DWDM) transponder to significantly boost its long-distance, high-capacity, data center networking capabilities.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How a bot management file push crippled Cloudflare’s global network
item.description: A massive outage at content delivery network Cloudflare, which took down services including ChatGPT, Canva and parts of AWS, was traced to a routine change in database permissions linked to Cloudflare’s Bot Management system, which inadvertently knocked offline a significant portion of the web.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft touts scalability of its new PostgreSQL-compatible managed database
item.description: Microsoft is previewing a third PostgreSQL-compatible managed database for its cloud, Azure HorizonDB, that it hopes will prove attractive for modern workloads and for legacy application modernization.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Singapore makes the leap to Wi-Fi 7 to boost fan experience
item.description: Recently, Cisco held the Asia-Pacific version of its Cisco Live user event. While this event is typically used to announce new Cisco products, the news payload this year included an interesting customer use case.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok malware scam tricks you with fake activation guides
item.description: New TikTok malware campaign tricks users into running PowerShell commands that download Aura Stealer, which steals credentials and authentication tokens.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
